languages.text: "Даже великий лорд огир не сумел удержать в путах Аребенниан..." {n}В голосе Ирлиэт сквозит восхищение — и ужас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Даже великий лорд огир не сумел удержать в путах Аребенниан..." {n}В голосе Ирлиэт сквозит восхищение — и ужас.{/n}

languages.text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Даже великий лорд огир не сумел удержать в путах Аребенниан..." {n}В голосе Ирлиэт сквозит восхищение — и ужас.{/n}

"Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

languages.text: “连那位伟大的遗落者领主都没能把独角束缚住……”{n}伊莉耶特的声音里既有钦佩，也有恐惧。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “连那位伟大的遗落者领主都没能把独角束缚住……”{n}伊莉耶特的声音里既有钦佩，也有恐惧。{/n}

languages.text: «Ni siquiera el poderoso señor de los Oghyr pudo mantener cautivo al Arebennian...». {n}La admiración y el horror se mezclan en la voz de Yrliet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Ni siquiera el poderoso señor de los Oghyr pudo mantener cautivo al Arebennian...». {n}La admiración y el horror se mezclan en la voz de Yrliet.{/n}

languages.text: « Même le grand seigneur oghyr s'est montré incapable de maintenir les Arebennians sous son joug... » {n}Vous sentez de l'admiration – et de l'horreur – dans la voix d'Yrliet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Même le grand seigneur oghyr s'est montré incapable de maintenir les Arebennians sous son joug... » {n}Vous sentez de l'admiration – et de l'horreur – dans la voix d'Yrliet.{/n}

languages.text: "Yüce Oghyr lordu bile Arebennian'ı esaret altında tutmayı başaramamıştı..." {n}Yrliet'in sesinde hem hayranlık hem de dehşet seziliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yüce Oghyr lordu bile Arebennian'ı esaret altında tutmayı başaramamıştı..." {n}Yrliet'in sesinde hem hayranlık hem de dehşet seziliyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Nicht einmal der mächtige Oghyr-Lord konnte den Arebennian in Ketten legen ..." {n}Du erkennst Bewunderung — und Entsetzen — in Yrliets Stimme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not even the great Oghyr lord was able to keep the Arebennian in bondage..." {n}There is admiration — and horror — in Yrliet's voice.{/n}

languages.text: 「偉大なオグイヤーの領主ですら、アラベニアンを奴隷に抑えられなかった...」{n}イェリエットの口調には、敬意と恐怖が混ざっている.{/n}
